title: Reproduce the WSSV circular conservation ring comparison in the web app
summary: Build a single-reference circular White spot syndrome virus diagram with 20 conservation rings generated from browser LOSAT blastn results.
primaryWorkflow: Circular conservation rings with browser LOSAT blastn
requirements: Enough available memory for one WSSV GenBank record, 20 comparison FASTA files, and LOSAT blastn output.

downloads.note: Download the JP02 White spot syndrome virus record as a GenBank flat file.

downloads.note: Prepare the complete comparison genome sequence as FASTA.

manualSteps.title: Switch to Circular mode
manualSteps.body: Open gbdraw.app and select Circular mode before adding the WSSV reference record.

manualSteps.title: Upload the reference GenBank file
manualSteps.body: Upload AP027280.gb as the circular reference. This record is the JP02 White spot syndrome virus genome shown at the center of the Gallery figure.

rows: CDS, rRNA, tRNA, tmRNA, ncRNA, repeat_region

media.alt: Circular GenBank uploader with the AP027280.gb file chip.
media.caption: Upload AP027280.gb in the Circular GenBank uploader.

manualSteps.title: Set the basic circular layout
manualSteps.body: Use a spread-out circular track so the outer CDS features remain readable around the conservation rings.

operations.title: Track preset selector
operations.body: Open Track Preset and choose Spreadout.

media.alt: Layout card with the Track Preset menu open and the Spreadout option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Track Preset in the Layout card and choose the highlighted Spreadout option.

operations.title: Legend position selector
operations.body: Open Legend Position and choose Left.

media.alt: Title and Legend card with the Legend Position menu open and the Left option highlighted.
media.caption: Open Legend Position in the Title & Legend card and choose the highlighted Left option.

manualSteps.title: Open Circular Conservation
manualSteps.body: Enable circular conservation, then upload the 20 comparison FASTA files in the order listed in the ring-label table below.
manualSteps.note: If you import precomputed conservation BLAST tables instead of running browser LOSAT, use the subject/reference orientation expected by those tables.

operations.title: Circular Conservation panel
operations.body: Open Pairwise Comparisons and choose Run LOSAT with LOSATN.

media.alt: Pairwise Comparisons panel open with Run LOSAT, LOSATN, thresholds, and comparison FASTA controls.
media.caption: Open Pairwise Comparisons and choose Run LOSAT with LOSATN.

operations.title: Comparison FASTA series rows
operations.body: Use the table below for the full FASTA order, then check that the uploaded series rows show the expected labels and row controls.

media.alt: Comparison FASTA series rows for CN01, WSSV-TW, WSSV-CN, and WSSV-TH with color swatches and order controls.
media.caption: The representative FASTA series rows show labels, color swatches, and row controls; use the table for all 20 inputs.

manualSteps.title: Name the conservation rings
manualSteps.body: Assign one short label per FASTA so the left legend and each ring order match the Gallery figure.

media.alt: Comparison FASTA label rows with short labels such as CN01, WSSV-TW, and WSSV-CN.
media.caption: Enter the short ring labels listed in the table.

manualSteps.title: Set ring colors
manualSteps.body: Use distinct ring colors so conservation gaps can be compared by eye across the full 20-genome stack.

media.alt: Comparison FASTA color swatches for the conservation ring rows.
media.caption: Set the conservation ring colors listed in the table.

manualSteps.title: Set conservation thresholds
manualSteps.body: Use strict blastn thresholds so the rings show high-confidence conserved nucleotide segments.

media.alt: LOSAT Settings thresholds with bitscore 100, e-value 1e-30, identity 90, and minimum length 100.
media.caption: Set bitscore 100, e-value 1e-30, identity 90, and minimum length 100.

manualSteps.title: Run browser LOSAT
manualSteps.body: Use Auto execution with a Safe total thread budget for the first run. The saved session includes cached LOSAT output; manual rebuilds need to run the FASTA comparisons once.

media.alt: Browser LOSAT controls with LOSATN megablast, Safe threads, and strict thresholds.
media.caption: Use Auto execution, Safe threads, and LOSATN megablast.

manualSteps.title: Generate the diagram
manualSteps.body: Click Generate Diagram. The preview should show the AP027280 feature ring, 20 conservation rings, the position scale, and a left legend with an identity gradient for each comparison genome.

media.alt: Generated WSSV conservation diagram with 20 conservation rings and the left identity legend.
media.caption: The generated preview stacks 20 conservation rings inside the reference CDS feature ring.

manualSteps.title: Inspect a CDS feature
manualSteps.body: Click an outer CDS feature in the interactive SVG to inspect the label, location, product, protein_id, and source qualifiers.

media.alt: Zoomed WSSV conservation crop with the clicked outer CDS, conservation rings, and feature popup metadata.
media.caption: The zoomed crop keeps the clicked CDS, ring context, and note, product, and protein_id metadata readable.

actions.script: document.querySelector('.preview-feature-search')?.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important'); const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app) { app.resultPanelTab = 'preview'; app.zoom = 1.25; if (app.svgContainer) app.svgContainer.style.transform = 'translate(-80px, -40px) scale(1.25)'; }
const app = window.__GBDRAW_APP__; if (app?.clickedFeature) { app.clickedFeature.activeTab = 'details'; } if (app?.clickedFeaturePos) { app.clickedFeaturePos.x = 520; app.clickedFeaturePos.y = 260; }

postGenerationEdits.title: Use zoom before editing
postGenerationEdits.body: This SVG is large. Zoom or pan the preview before clicking small CDS features or inspecting narrow conservation gaps.

media.alt: WSSV web app floating preview controls with Reset Layout, Layout edit, Canvas padding, and zoom buttons visible.
media.caption: The floating preview toolbar shows zoom together with reset, layout edit, and canvas padding controls.

postGenerationEdits.title: Export SVG first
postGenerationEdits.body: Download SVG when you need editable vector output. PNG and PDF export can take longer for this large, detailed interactive figure.

media.alt: Circular Preview export toolbar with the DPI selector and SVG, Interactive SVG, PNG, and PDF export buttons visible.
media.caption: The Preview export toolbar shows DPI plus SVG, Interactive SVG, PNG, and PDF export controls.

postGenerationEdits.title: Save a session
postGenerationEdits.body: Save a .gbdraw-session.json after edits so the web app can restore inputs, LOSAT cache, conservation series settings, generated output, and SVG adjustments.

media.alt: Circular web app header toolbar with Save Session, Load Session, Reset Settings, undo and redo, the session title, and mode controls visible.
media.caption: The app header toolbar shows Save Session in the same toolbar used to load sessions.

losatTips.title: Use blastn megablast for close viral genomes
losatTips.body: The WSSV comparison uses nucleotide-level conservation, so blastn with megablast is the appropriate browser LOSAT workflow.

losatTips.title: Start with Auto execution
losatTips.body: Auto uses threaded LOSAT only when the browser supports it and the workload justifies it.

losatTips.title: Prefer Safe total threads
losatTips.body: Safe avoids consuming every logical CPU and is the best default for keeping the browser responsive during 20 FASTA comparisons.

losatTips.title: Use Serial on constrained browsers
losatTips.body: If threaded WebAssembly is unavailable or the tab becomes unresponsive, switch Execution to Serial before rerunning.

losatTips.title: Reuse the cache
losatTips.body: Raw LOSAT results are reused when the canonical inputs and LOSAT settings match, so styling-only changes should be faster after the first run.

troubleshooting.title: Conservation rings are missing
troubleshooting.body: Check that Circular Conservation is enabled, comparison FASTA files are uploaded, source is set to Run LOSAT from FASTA inputs, and the generated result is the circular output.

troubleshooting.title: A ring appears in the wrong order
troubleshooting.body: Check the FASTA upload order, ring labels, and ring colors. The legend follows the configured conservation series order.

troubleshooting.title: The rings look too sparse
troubleshooting.body: The Gallery figure uses strict thresholds. Lower identity or alignment length only when you intentionally want weaker matches to appear.

troubleshooting.title: The browser becomes slow
troubleshooting.body: Use the Gallery session for inspection, close other heavy tabs, run LOSAT with Safe or Serial settings, or temporarily use fewer comparison FASTA files while tuning layout.

troubleshooting.title: Threaded LOSAT is unavailable
troubleshooting.body: Use Auto or Serial execution. Some browser contexts disable SharedArrayBuffer or cross-origin isolation, which prevents threaded WebAssembly.

troubleshooting.title: The generated diagram differs from the Gallery image
troubleshooting.body: Check AP027280.gb, spreadout track type, separate strands, suppressed GC and skew tracks, conservation ring width and gap, thresholds, labels, colors, and comparison FASTA order.
